templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot use words starting with the letter {LETTER}
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} uses a forbidden word, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot drink with their {HAND} hand
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} can now drink with both hands
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks with the forbidden hand, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must always drink standing up
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} drinks sitting down, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must say '{PHRASE}' before every drink
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to say phrases before drinking
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets the phrase, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

PHRASE: Up, down, to the center and inside!

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot laugh for {ROUNDS} rounds
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} laughs, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must speak with a {ACCENT} accent
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} speaks without an accent, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot point at anyone with their finger
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} points with their finger, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must end every sentence with a word that rhymes
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to rhyme sentences
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't rhyme, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say names of people during the game
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says a name, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must do a little dance before each drink
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to dance before drinking
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} doesn't dance, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1}, every time {PLAYER2} drinks for the game, you drink {MULTIPLIER} drinks
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER1} no longer needs to imitate {PLAYER2}'s drinks
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} doesn't drink when they should, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} cannot look each other in the eyes
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} can look at each other normally
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} make eye contact, both drink {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} must always speak in unison when it's their turn
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} are not synchronized, both drink {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} and {PLAYER2} cannot speak directly to each other
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} or {PLAYER2} speak directly to each other, both drink {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} is the bodyguard of {PLAYER2}. When {PLAYER2} must drink, {PLAYER1} drinks half (rounded up)
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} fails their bodyguard duty, drinks {DRINKS} additional drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} must repeat everything {PLAYER2} says but changing the word order to sound like Yoda
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER1} no longer needs to translate depending on {PLAYER2}
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} doesn't translate correctly, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say proper names
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says a proper name, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must speak in third person about themselves
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} won't do it, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} cannot say the word 'no'
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} says 'no', drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER} must end every sentence with a word ending in {VOWEL}
templates.endTemplate: {PLAYER} no longer needs to end sentences with that vowel
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER} forgets, drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: If {PLAYER} breaks any rule or challenge, drinks {DRINKS} drinks
templates.punishment: When breaking a rule, {PLAYER} drinks {DRINKS} drinks

templates.template: {PLAYER1} must {INSULT}
templates.punishment: If {PLAYER1} fails, they drink {DRINKS} drinks

INSULT: look at {PLAYER2} like they are the worst decision of their life
talk to {PLAYER2} as if they were a being without neurons
end every sentence of {PLAYER2} with 'as always, making a fool of yourself'
imitate {PLAYER2} as if they were a caveman without evolution
tell {PLAYER2} a new insult every time they speak
shout 'Shut up, clown!' every time {PLAYER2} tries to speak
act as if {PLAYER2} smelled like failure
ask {PLAYER2} if they finished elementary school, every turn
use an idiot voice every time they imitate {PLAYER2}
bow to {PLAYER2} as if they were the king of idiots
tell {PLAYER2} that their IQ is negative every time they try to speak

templates.template: {PLAYER} {RIDICULE}
templates.punishment: For failing, drink {DRINKS} drinks

RIDICULE: must speak like a robot during the whole turn
must speak as if holding an imaginary microphone in a reality show
must speak with a high-pitched and exaggerated cartoon voice
can only move in slow motion
must make animal sounds before every sentence

templates.template: {PLAYER} {DRINKING_RULE}
templates.punishment: If breaking the drinking rule, drink {DRINKS} drinks

DRINKING_RULE: can only drink using their elbows
must drink with their eyes closed
cannot use a straw to drink
must drink with their head tilted back all the time
must drink from a glass placed on the floor
